  • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

    Roma have been picking up a few positive results recently and look more purposeful moving the ball through midfield and wide areas, though they still give up chances in transition. Genoa’s form has been more up and down, with some narrow losses and draws, and they tend to stay compact off the ball and look to push forward more directly when they win possession. In their recent meetings Roma usually have more of the play and look to control the tempo, while Genoa focus on organisation and making the most of quick forward moments.
